Interface UserLoginREPO

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<UserLoginTBL, Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<UserLoginTBL, Integer>
@Repository public interface UserLoginREPO extends org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<UserLoginTBL, Integer>
Spring Data JPA repository for UserLoginTBL entities.

This repository provides CRUD operations and custom queries for user login records.

    Description

    Finds user login records by email address.

    Finds user login records by email address and active status.

    Finds user login records by ID and active status.

    Finds user login records by user key and active status.

  • Method Details

    • findByUsernameAndActive

      List<UserLoginTBL> findByUsernameAndActive(String username, int active)
      Finds user login records by username and active status.
      Parameters:
      username - the username to match
      active - the active status to match
      Returns:
      list of matching user login records

    • findByEmailaddressAndActive

      List<UserLoginTBL> findByEmailaddressAndActive(String emailaddress, int active)
      Finds user login records by email address and active status.
      Parameters:
      emailaddress - the email address to match
      active - the active status to match
      Returns:
      list of matching user login records

      List<UserLoginTBL> findByUsernameStartingWithAndActive(String searchString, Integer activeOn)
      Finds user login records by username starting with search string and active status.
      Parameters:
      searchString - the string to match at the start of username
      activeOn - the active status to match
      Returns:
      list of matching user login records
